quoteLast: : Dived--several destroyers of G 101     class in sight. Attacked same. 10 A.M.: sighted hostile     submarine--attacked same. Torpedoed submarine with one torpedo     amidship. Surface to look for survivors. Was put down immediately     by destroyer, who opened fire. 10.41: altered course N., and went     to bottom in 18 fathoms. Heard loud explosion. Destroyers sweeping     for us all day.
title: The Story of Our Submarines
author: Bower, John Graham, 1886-1940
